package.title: Lepchajagat • Lava • Lolegaon Canopy Walk Serenity

highlights.text: Serial code WB-015 | TRAGUIN tour code TRAGUIN-WB-015
State / Country: West Bengal / India | Category: Offbeat Nature & Serenity Tour
Ideal for: Nature Lovers, Couples, Families, Photographers
Vehicle: Premium Private 4WD SUV dedicated throughout mountain trails
Meal Plan: Modified American Plan (Breakfast & Dinner Included)
Route: NJP/Bagdogra Arrival → Lepchajagat → Lava → Lolegaon → NJP/Bagdogra Departure
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Curated morning tea-tasting tour with an expert local sommelier.
Shopping: Organic cardamom, alpine cheese (Chhurpi), Tibetan woolens, and Darjeeling tea.
Important Notes: Mountain weather unpredictable — carry warm layers. Canopy Walk subject to forest department clearance. Advance booking advisable.

itinerary.title: Lepchajagat • Lava • Lolegaon Canopy Walk Serenity
itinerary.tagline: Lepchajagat • Lava • Lolegaon Canopy Walk Serenity • 04 Nights / 05 Days
itinerary.overview:
Escape into the misty, untouched pine forests of the Eastern Himalayas. This Premium West Bengal Offbeat Experience transports you far away from commercial tourist tracks into a world of pristine silence, cozy luxury mountain lodges, and spellbinding panoramic views of Mount Kanchenjunga. Curated exclusively by TRAGUIN for discerning travelers who seek peaceful indulgence.

TOUR OVERVIEW
Travel Dates: Flexible / As per preference. Group / FIT: Bespoke Private Luxury Tour. Vehicle: Premium Private 4WD SUV dedicated throughout the mountain trails. Meal Plan: Modified American Plan (Breakfast & Dinner Included). Route: NJP/Bagdogra Arrival → Lepchajagat → Lava → Lolegaon → NJP/Bagdogra Departure.

TRAGUIN Curated Experience Note: Luxury boutique stays overlooking mountain ridges, private bonfire dinners, early morning sunrise trail assistance, and seamless high-altitude transfers.
itinerary.seo_title: WB-015 | Lepchajagat Lava Lolegaon Serenity | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days West Bengal offbeat package (WB-015 / TRAGUIN-WB-015): Lepchajagat pine forests, Lava Monastery, Lolegaon Canopy Walk, and 4-tier boutique mountain lodges.

highlights.text: Lepchajagat sunrise over Kanchenjunga and whispering pine forest nature walk
Kalimpong Delo Park, Pine View Nursery en route to cloud-kissed Lava hamlet
Lava Monastery (Kagyu Thegchen Ling) and Lolegaon Canopy Walk among century-old pines
Jhandi Dara Sunrise Point and private bonfire dinner with gourmet finger food
4-tier combined boutique mountain lodges: Lepchajagat & Lava (04 Nights)

days.title: ARRIVAL NJP / BAGDOGRA TO LEPCHAJAGAT
days.description: Your premium mountain escape begins the moment you land at Bagdogra Airport or arrive at New Jalpaiguri (NJP) Railway Station. A designated TRAGUIN hospitality concierge will welcome you and escort you to your private high-performance luxury SUV. Enjoy a beautiful, winding scenic drive through emerald tea estates and misty alpine forests up to Lepchajagat. Upon checking into your premium boutique resort, unwind with a steaming cup of authentic Darjeeling tea while watching the sun descend over the tranquil Himalayan valleys.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Scenic foothills transit, Mirik Lake (en route optional).
Optional Activities: Evening tea tasting session.
Evening Experience: Mountain sunset viewing from your private balcony.

days.title: LEPCHAJAGAT SERENITY & PINE FOREST WALK
days.description: Wake up early to witness a breathtaking sunrise painting Mount Kanchenjunga in hues of gold and crimson. After an artisanal breakfast, join our local expert for a gentle, curated nature walk through the whispering pine forests of Lepchajagat. Discover hidden viewpoints, enjoy bird-spotting, and indulge in pristine photography sessions. The afternoon is kept completely at leisure for you to enjoy the premium amenities of your boutique lodge.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Sunrise point walk, Lepchajagat Pine Reserve.
Evening Experience: Private bonfire dinner with local folk music.

days.title: LEPCHAJAGAT TO LAVA VIA KALIMPONG
days.description: Following breakfast, we check out and drive towards the pristine town of Lava, passing through the beautiful city of Kalimpong. En route, stop to visit the serene Delo Park for majestic views of the Teesta River and the magnificent Pine View Nursery, famed for its massive collection of exotic cacti. Arrive at Lava by afternoon—a quiet hamlet wrapped in everlasting clouds. Check into your premium resort and spend the evening enjoying a cozy fireplace dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Delo Park Kalimpong, Pine View Nursery.
Optional Activities: Kalimpong local market stroll.
Evening Experience: Cozy fireside dining and mountain storytelling.

days.title: LAVA SIGHTSEEING & LOLEGAON CANOPY WALK
days.description: Today features one of the most immersive experiences of your holiday. First, visit the beautiful, peaceful Lava Monastery (Kagyu Thegchen Ling Monastery) nestled amidst the clouds. Then, take a short, beautiful drive to Lolegaon to experience the famous Canopy Walk. Walk across secure, swaying footbridges suspended high up in the tree tops of the heritage forest, feeling completely at one with nature. Visit Jhandi Dara Sunrise Point before returning to your premium resort for your final night.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Lava Monastery, Lolegaon Canopy Walk, Jhandi Dara Viewpoint.
Evening Experience: Premium farewell multi-cuisine dinner curated by the chef.

days.title: DEPARTURE FROM LAVA TO NJP / BAGDOGRA
days.description: Enjoy a final luxury breakfast overlooking the cloud-kissed pine valleys. Pack your bags along with your unforgettable memories of this pristine offbeat wonderland. Your private luxury SUV will pick you up for a smooth, relaxed drive down to NJP Railway Station or Bagdogra Airport for your journey back home, concluding your premium TRAGUIN experience.
activities: Optional Activities: Last-minute roadside tea estate photography.

inclusions.text: Accommodation: 04 Nights stay at selected premium mountain chalets and boutique resorts.
Meals: Daily organic breakfast and multi-cuisine dinners.
Transfers: Dedicated private premium luxury 4WD SUV for all transits and sightseeing.
Sightseeing: Complete guided tours including entry permits to Canopy Walk and viewpoints.
Assistance: 24/7 dedicated on-call operational support from mountain travel experts.
Taxes: All luxury resort taxes, driver allowances, toll fees, and green mountain permits.
Welcome Amenities: Choice of freshly brewed Darjeeling First Flush Tea or hot cocoa upon arrival.
Complimentary Experiences: Private evening bonfire with gourmet finger food.
TRAGUIN Support: Real-time remote route monitoring for total comfort.
Airfare or train tickets to Bagdogra / New Jalpaiguri.
Personal expenses such as laundry, liquor, telephone calls, or tips.
Extra costs arising due to mountain landslides, roadblocks, or political strikes.
